title: AWS Bedrock Added OpenAI GPT-5.4 And GPT-5.5 In US East N. Virginia
summary: AWS announced OpenAI GPT-5.4 and GPT-5.5 availability on Amazon Bedrock in US East (N. Virginia), expanding regional Bedrock access for OpenAI model workloads through the Responses API.

evidence_refs.license_note: Official announcement reviewed for factual metadata; no provider prose copied.

impacts.recommended_action: Verify us-east-1 account access, Bedrock model availability, pricing, quotas, and Responses API behavior before routing GPT-5.4 or GPT-5.5 workloads through Bedrock.
Update regional allowlists, data-residency notes, and fallback routing if us-east-1 Bedrock availability changes preferred OpenAI model placement.
Refresh model metadata for context-window assumptions, multimodal input support, tool-calling support, and streaming behavior before exposing these Bedrock model IDs through gateways or SDK defaults.

detail.migration_notes: This event records Bedrock regional availability, not OpenAI first-party API availability, account eligibility, exact pricing, or feature parity.

limitations: APW records availability and regional facts only; exact account eligibility, quota, pricing, latency, and feature parity require AWS account-level verification.
The official announcement was reviewed for factual metadata; no provider prose is copied into APW.
